# CURL(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  curl — transfer data from or to a server

## SYNOPSIS
  curl [options] <url>

## DESCRIPTION
Makes HTTP/HTTPS requests to web servers and APIs.

## OPTIONS
  -X METHOD  HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
  -d data    POST body data
  -H header  add HTTP header
  -s         silent mode

## EXAMPLES
  curl nexus.corp/api/status
  curl -X POST nexus.corp/api/login -d 'user=ghost'
  curl -s https://api.chimera.corp/v1/nodes

## SEE ALSO
  wget, nc, nmap
